text.title: Launch Raci Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Launch Raci Template artefact. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

list.item: artefact_id — stable identifier (slug + ISO date or UUID).
template_version — semver matching the methodology's version frontmatter.
owner — single named person or team, never blank.
last_touched — ISO-8601 timestamp at write time.
trigger — the activity / event that justified producing this artefact.
fields — structured payload defined by templates/output-schema.json.
evidence — list of {source, citation} pairs anchoring every non-trivial field.
next_action — single named next step with owner and due-cycle.

antipattern.description: artefact emitted with template_version empty or unknown.
antipattern.reason: downstream parsers cannot reconcile schema drift.

antipattern.description: evidence array empty for non-trivial fields.
antipattern.reason: fields without verbatim anchor are fabrication risks.

antipattern.description: status auto-set to "approved" by the agent without a named human reviewer.
antipattern.reason: self-approval defeats the human checkpoint and the audit trail.

antipattern.description: prose paragraph stuffed into a field declared as a list/dict in templates/output-schema.json.

list.item: Trim verbatim citations for length while preserving specifics (numbers, named tools, dates).
Group near-duplicate evidence items, but record group_size and a representative citation.
Carry forward unchanged values from the prior cycle's artefact when source-of-truth shows no delta.
template_version populated and matches the methodology frontmatter.
owner is a single named entity.
Every non-trivial field has >=1 evidence entry.
status is one of the allowed enum values.
next_action has an owner and a due-cycle.

text.reference: JSON Schema for the methodology's required output.
